Transform the following sentence: He is the best boy in the class. (Comparative)
options_html: No other boy is as good as he is.
He is better than any other boy in the class.
He is better than all other boys in the class.
He is as better as any other boy in the class.
correct_answer_html: He is better than any other boy in the class.

question_html: Transform the following sentence: I am sure that I shall get a scholarship. (simple)
options_html: I am sure of getting a scholarship.
I am sure to get a scholarship.
I shall get a scholarship surely.
I shall surely to get a scholarship.
correct_answer_html: I am sure of getting a scholarship.
